## Agent Service

- `legacy agent run --harness=<name> --prompt <file>` - Invoke an AI agent
- `legacy agent run --quorum=majority --harnesses=a,b` - Multi-agent consensus
- `legacy agent execute-bead <id> [--from <rev>] [--no-merge]` - Run in isolated worktree
- `legacy agent execute-loop` - Drain bead queue (prefer ddx work)
- `legacy agent list` - Show available harnesses
